ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(AND( OR(TEXT(PRIORVALUE( Status__c)) = 'Approved',TEXT(PRIORVALUE( Status__c)) = 'Rejected') ,
OR( (ISCHANGED( Required_Amount__c)), (ISCHANGED( Principal_Balance__c)), (ISCHANGED( Settlement_complete_date__c)), (ISCHANGED( Proposal_Amount__c)), (ISCHANGED( Payment_Plan_Amount__c)), (ISCHANGED( Payment_Plan_Length__c)), (ISCHANGED( Product__c)), (ISCHANGED( Judgment__c)), (ISCHANGED( Placement__c)), (ISCHANGED( Company__c)), (ISCHANGED( Employment__c)), (ISCHANGED( Employment_Comments__c)), (ISCHANGED( Homeowner_Status__c)),(ISCHANGED( HomeOwner_Status_Comments__c)),(ISCHANGED( Monthly_Income__c)), (ISCHANGED( Monthly_Income_Comments__c)),(ISCHANGED( Monthly_Expenses__c)),(ISCHANGED( Monthly_Expenses_Comments__c)),(ISCHANGED( Total_Wealth__c)),(ISCHANGED( Total_Wealth_Comments__c)))),
OR(AND(TEXT(PRIORVALUE( Status__c)) = 'Approved', OR(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Rejected'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'More Info Required'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Ready for review'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'In Progress'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'New'))),
AND(TEXT(PRIORVALUE( Status__c)) = 'Rejected', OR(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Approved'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'More Info Required'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Ready for review'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'In Progress'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'New') )) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Settlement cannot be edited once it has been Approved/Rejected
